title: add a way to disable PTY allocation
body:
Fixes #179

This patch resolves the original issue: https://github.com/ansible/ansible/pull/26170#issuecomment-312591504

Signed-off-by: Tomas Tomecek <ttomecek@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Do we need the same feature for buildah bud?


We also need bash completion.

> Do we need the same feature for buildah bud?

`docker build` doesn't have such option. I suspect it may not be needed. The only problem may be if some tools try to be interactive (that's what I run into with `run`). Not sure if PTY is allocated by default.

I think I addressed all the comments.
@rhatdan Yup, looks good to me.  Merging.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/5f80a1033b7151e7d73d8bc70773db115f16413b.1499955969120988416/index.html)
Approved by: nalind
Pushing 5f80a1033b7151e7d73d8bc70773db115f16413b to master...
